provenance.derivation: frozen S6 contact projection joined exactly to S5 and release-qualified by O1

scope: one canonicalized selected exact cover for each S5 row; not an enumeration of all covers

definitions.omega_coned: intersection of closed barycentric flag subcomplexes
definitions.omega_boundary_spherical_shadow: subcomplex of coned Omega consisting of faces not containing the full-support cone vertex 0123
definitions.kappa: rank-colored counts of proper common flag vertices
definitions.s4_relabeling_type: orbit of the exact labeled Omega complex under simultaneous digit relabeling by locked S4; not abstract isomorphism
definitions.selected_cover_edgewise_s4_omega_type_gr: piece-permutation graph whose edge labels are independently canonicalized S4-Omega types; no single global S4 family equivalence is computed

omega.definition: exact intersection of the two closed barycentric flag subcomplexes

s4_relabeling_type.equivalence: simultaneous relabeling by the locked S4 action

selected_cover_edgewise_s4_omega_type_gr.equivalence_computed: piece-index permutation after independently replacing each edge Omega by its locked simultaneous-S4 relabeling-orbit type
selected_cover_edgewise_s4_omega_type_gr.not_computed: equivalence of the whole cover-intersection family under one single global S4 relabeling
